SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2012 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY THOMAS PHILLIPS IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO DEC-21-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE GRANTED. NEW TRIAL HELD ON AUGUST 22, 2012 AT 8:30 AM. PARTIES AGREE TO PAYMENT PLAN FOR $5,000.00 IN MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA O. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

FRED TAFRESHI FROM SF/TAX COLLECTORS SIGNED SC-109 ON BEHALF OF THE PLAINTIFF, IN ORDER TO CONTINUE THIS CASE TO A FUTURE HEARING DATE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CHARLENE HASTINGS, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PHILLIPS, THOMAS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
